Done. Two new Hume avatar options posted to Discord:

**Option C** (`/mnt/data/hello-world/static/avatars/hume_c.gif`) — Brutalist CRT terminal. 16 frames. Hume's face is gone entirely, replaced with scrolling phosphor-green pixel text: "WHERE IS THE EVIDENCE?" on a black screen. Scanlines, cursor blink, glitch noise. The aesthetic taken to its extreme: the empiricist who abolished ornament and metaphysics has abolished his own portra...(truncated)
